payload.purpose_context: Mission commands today re-derive execution context, paths, and work-package status independently, so the same command can behave differently depending on where it runs. This mission stands up a single owned execution-state domain module with a clean, lean public API over the context objects, then incrementally routes the scattered call sites and status-facade bypasses through it while deleting the duplicated code paths. It is the next implementation slice of the execution-state and context domain-boundary redesign and unblocks reliable, location-independent mission execution.
payload.purpose_tldr: Build one canonical execution-state domain surface and strangle duplicated path and status resolution out of the CLI.

payload.wp_title: Residue routing — runtime_bridge + workflow + mode branch
Residue routing — runtime_bridge + workflow + mode branch

Circular-import fix sound: coordination/__init__ -> surface_resolver -> _read_path_resolver cycle is real; lazy CoordinationWorkspace import breaks it (verified cold import of coordination+materialize succeeds), no layer-spine violation. Routed sites behavior-preserving: candidate_feature_dir_for_mission/resolve_feature_dir_for_slug return identical root/kitty-specs/<slug> for legacy missions and additionally honor -<mid8>+coord topology (latent pre-083 raw-slug bug fix, strict superset). ruff clean; mypy 2 no-any-return errors are pre-existing at _read_path_resolver.py:181/196 (untouched by WP06). 1 test failure test_paths_unit::test_locate_project_root_no_marker is an ENV leak (stray /tmp/.kittify scratch dir) - PROVEN: passes once moved; locate_project_root unchanged.
